example.title: Medium CR impact memo: add export-to-PDF to billing dashboard
example.inputs: CR-101: add export-to-PDF feature to billing dashboard. Rubric bin: M. Approver: VP Finance (per change-request-impact-rubric). Affected: 3 stories + 12 AC + 8 tests.
example.commentary: Illustrates r1 (single instance), r2 (typed evidence), r3 (named owner + approver), r4 (versioned), r5 (deltas computable from traceability graph).
